title: ShineaL's Prehistoric Expansion
description: Mythology And Prehistoric Creatures Reclaim The Overworld
body:
ShineaL's Prehistoric Expansion Is A MOD That Brings In Various Dinosaurs, Prehistoric Creatures, Extinct Animals and Mythological Creatures To The Game.

Each creature has its own unique animations, drops and behaviours to make them feel alive and fit with the world of Minecraft.

Report Any Bugs, Issues, Feature Requests and more in our [Our Discord](https://discord.gg/AH2tQpWset)

The MOD Will Receive Future Updates, Adding New Creatures, Items, Biomes, Structures And More.

Geckolib is a required dependency up until PE Version 1.4.5.


Animations: Grapes/ShinyDragon96

Block/Item Textures: Grapes/ShinyDragon96/Kemiu

Models: Grapes/Kemiu/OtacioSCRP

Coding: GlitchedMastery
